name: RoverPass Campground Management API
what_it_does: RoverPass REST API for campground reservation and management platform. Enables AI agents to manage campsite and RV hookup availability, process online reservations, retrieve guest profiles and booking history, manage pricing and seasonal rates, handle payment processing, manage amenity bookings, and integrate campground data with marketing and review platforms.
use_cases: Managing campsite availability and online reservations from campground operations agents
Processing guest check-in workflows from camp management agents
Updating seasonal pricing and promotions from revenue management agents
Retrieving booking analytics from campground performance agents
not_for: State and national park reservations without private campground management
Glamping resorts without traditional campground and RV park workflows
Vacation rental without RV and tent camping site management
best_when: A private RV park or campground using RoverPass wants AI agents to automate reservation management, guest communication, pricing updates, and booking analytics workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and booking information requires careful handling. Campground safety regulations may limit automated guest access systems.

auth.notes: RoverPass uses API key authentication. Park-level credentials. API access for integration partners. No granular scope control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic plan; API and advanced features on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-park pricing; Pro plan includes API and automation features
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas company, founded 2016. Campground and RV park reservation platform with marketplace and management tools. Network of 8,000+ parks. Both reservation marketplace and management SaaS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal and booking data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No webhooks — requires polling for reservation updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full park access
Limited developer documentation compared to larger campground platforms
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest and campground booking data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Limited documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest booking data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
